contacts.name: Patricia Weston
contacts.title: VP Infrastructure & Operations
contacts.notes: Technical champion. Reports to CISO. Likely to advocate internally for assessment.

contacts.name: Gerald Hutchins
contacts.title: Chief Information Security Officer
contacts.notes: Budget holder. Attended ICS-CERT summit March 2025. Vocal about OT/IT convergence risk.

contacts.name: Renata Flores
contacts.title: Director of EHS & Security
contacts.notes: Manages PSM program. Frustrated with current vendor. Open to new approaches based on LinkedIn activity.

contacts.name: Mark Driscoll
contacts.title: COO
contacts.notes: Final approver for all major vendor contracts. Former plant manager — responds to operational risk framing.

contacts.name: Alicia Park
contacts.title: Chief Security Officer
contacts.notes: Initial call completed. Interested in FedRAMP readiness assessment. Sent capability deck.

contacts.name: Trevor Banks
contacts.title: VP Engineering
contacts.notes: Owns physical site build-out. Will influence physical security spec. Strong NIST background.

contacts.name: Dennis Hargrove
contacts.title: General Manager
contacts.notes: Under board pressure from consent decree. Motivated buyer. Needs to show progress in 90 days.

contacts.name: Sandra Kim
contacts.title: Compliance Manager
contacts.notes: Day-to-day point of contact. Will manage the engagement. Strong NERC knowledge.
